allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files", "C:\\Program Files \(x86\)", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs" -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Name -match "claude|chatgpt|anthropic|openai" } | Select-Object FullName)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name; ls "$env:APPDATA\\Programs" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name)

Bash(ls "C:/Users/lazic/AppData/Local/Programs/"; ls "C:/Users/lazic/AppData/Roaming/Microsoft/Windows/Start Menu/Programs/" 2>/dev/null | grep -i "claude\\|chatgpt\\|anthropic\\|openai" -i; find "C:/Users/lazic/AppData/Local" -maxdepth 3 -name "*.exe" 2>/dev/null | grep -i "claude\\|chatgpt" -i | head -20)
PowerShell(Get-AppxPackage | Where-Object { $_.Name -match "Claude" } | Select-Object Name, PackageFamilyName, InstallLocation)

PowerShell($shell = New-Object -ComObject Shell.Application; $apps = $shell.NameSpace\('shell:AppsFolder'\); $apps.Items\(\) | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'claude|chatgpt' } | Select-Object Name, Path)

PowerShell($shell = New-Object -ComObject Shell.Application; $apps = $shell.NameSpace\('shell:AppsFolder'\); $apps.Items\(\) | Select-Object Name, Path | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String | Select-String -Pattern "claude|chatgpt|openai" -CaseSensitive:$false)
